logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: TransactionId: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: " Started get covide cases by nationalId flow"

db:select.doc:name: Fetch Covid Cases By NationalID
db:select.db:sql: SELECT case_id, source, case_type, first_name, last_name, phone, email, date_of_birth, national_id, national_id_type, street_address, city, state, postal, country, create_date, update_date FROM CVD_CASE_MASTER WHERE national_id = :nationalId

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map ({ caseId: $.case_id, source: $.source, caseType: $.case_type, firstName: $.first_name, lastName: $.last_name, phone: $.phone, email: $.email, dateOfBirth: $.date_of_birth, nationalId: $.national_id, nationalIdType: $.national_id_type, address: { streetAddress: $.streetAddress, city: $.city, state: $.state, postal: $.postal, country: $.country }, createDate: $.create_date, updateDate: $.update_date })

raise-error.doc:name: Raise CUSTOM:COVID_CASE_NOT_FOUND
raise-error.description: The server has not found anything matching the request-URI

logger.doc:name: End Log
logger.message: TransactionId: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationId: #[vars.correlationId], message: "Completed get covid cases by nationalId flow"

ee:transform.doc:name: Set Covid Case Not Found Response

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 404, message: "Resource not found", description: error.description, dateTime: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}, transactionId: vars.transactionId }
